nasb.text: I would have despaired unless I had believed that I would see the goodness of the Lord In the land of the living.

esv.text: I believe that I shall look upon the goodness of the Lord in the land of the living!

cnv.text: 我還是相信，在活人之地， 我可以看見耶和華的恩惠。

ccb.text: 我深信今世必能看见耶和华的美善。

csbs.text: 我确实相信：在活人之地 我必会看到耶和华的美善。
